name: Manchester

salary.role: Agile Project Manager / Scrum Master (national average)

industries: Media and broadcasting, banking technology centres, e-commerce and a growing public-sector hub economy anchor project demand.
intro: Manchester has built the UK's most convincing second tech economy: the BBC and ITV anchor MediaCityUK, global banks run northern technology centres here, and the city's startup scene scales on lower costs than London with talent from four universities. Public-sector relocations — including major government hubs — add programme roles continuously. Northern employers fund certification because it anchors the salary uplift the region's tech boom is producing; PMP and Scrum credentials both feature in Manchester job adverts routinely. Our live online weekend batch runs early UK hours on the IST schedule, finishing by mid-afternoon each day — the workshop fits one weekend with afternoons spare. Afterwards you get structured exam application support, realistic mock exams, and open access to the trainer for questions until you're certified.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Manchester?
faq.a: Our current batches follow the Asia schedule: 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM IST, which converts to 04:30 AM – 01:30 PM GMT+1 in Manchester. You are welcome to join at those hours, or register interest and we will notify you first when batches in your region's hours are scheduled.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Manchester?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Manchester. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from United Kingdom?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in United Kingdom and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Manchester sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in United Kingdom accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Manchester — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Manchester: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
